title: geraniospermum × urbanum
intro: Geraniospermum × urbanum, also known as the urban geranium, is a plant species within the family Geraniaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with this plant include relief from pain, fever reduction, and wound healing, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Geraniospermum × urbanum can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments.
